untranslatable_reason: Signal requires backtesting pattern occurrence counts (minimum 5 historical occurrences) and win rate statistics (≥50% across occurrences). These meta-level pattern validation rules cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and technical analysis metrics. The signal requires a pattern recognition engine with historical occurrence tracking and statistical validation, which is outside the scope of technical indicator conditions.
translation_notes: This is a meta-rule about avoiding small-sample bias rather than a price-action signal. It requires counting pattern occurrences and calculating win rates, which demands historical pattern logging and statistical analysis beyond standard indicator comparisons. The backtest engine would need explicit pattern definition storage, occurrence counter, and performance tracking modules to implement this rule.
